## nsc instance download

Download a file from an instance.

```
nsc instance download [instance-id] <remote-path> [local-path] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -c, --container_name string   Target a container by name.
  -h, --help                    help for download
      --mkdir                   Create parent directories locally if they don't exist.
```
